calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-13-2017 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-21-2016 Continued To Feb-01-17 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Motion To Compel Arbitration
Off Calendar Oct-26-2016 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

The Court confirmed its tentative ruling. Defendant Lyft, Inc.'s Motion to Compel Arbitration is granted. No opposition filed. The moving party is to provide a form of order.

Judge: Harold Kahn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR #5976. (302/HK)

Notice Of Joinder And Defendant Telyans Joinder In Defendant Lyft, Incs Motion To Stay Litigation
Off Calendar Oct-26-2016 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

The Court confirmed its tentative ruling. Defendant Telyan's joinder in the motion to stay litigation is granted. No opposition filed. The moving party is to provide a form of order.

Judge: Harold Kahn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR #5976. (302/HK)

Motion To Stay Litigation
Off Calendar Oct-26-2016 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

The Court confirmed its tenative ruling. Defendant Lyft, Inc.'s Motion to Stay Litigation is granted. No opposition filed. The moving party is to provide a form of order.

Judge: Harold Kahn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR #5976. (302/HK)

Notice Of Joinder And Defendant Telyans Joinder In Defendant Lyft, Incs Motion To Compel Arbitration
Off Calendar Oct-26-2016 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

The Court confirmed its tentative ruling. Defendant Telyan's joinder in the motion to compel arbitration is granted. No opposition filed. The moving party is to provide a form of order.
Judge: Harold Kahn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR #5976. (302/HK)
